name: Reinsurance Group of America Incorporated 5.75% Fixed-To-Floating Rate Subordinated Debentures due 2056
summary: Reinsurance Group of America Incorporated 5.75% Fixed-To-Floating Rate Subordinated Debentures due 2056 are debt securities issued by Reinsurance Group of America. The debentures are subordinated to the company's senior debt obligations. Reinsurance Group of America is a leading global life and health reinsurance company.
